name: rhIGFBP-3
description: rhIGFBP-3 (recombinant human insulin-like growth factor binding protein-3) is Insmed’s proprietary anti-cancer compound that has demonstrated significant decreases in cancerous growth in several models of human. It is developed by Insmed and is currently under phase I of the clinical trail.
mechanismOfAction: rhIGFBP-3 is a protein that is normally found in our bloodstream that has been shown to induce cancer cell death in a variety of experimental systems. Several studies have demonstrated that cancer risk increases with decreasing levels of circulating IGFBP-3. IGFBP-3 can induce cell cycle arrest and enhance the efficacy of chemotherapeutic agents.
